auth.login.error.invalid-phone: Valid 10-digit Indian mobile number enter karein
auth.login.error.invalid-otp: OTP galat hai. {remaining} attempts bache hain.

auth.login.error.expired: OTP expire ho gaya. Naya code maangein.
auth.login.error.generic: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Dobara try karein.

staff.title: Staff Management
staff.invite-limit-reached: {plan} plan pe Doctor limit poori ho gayi. Zyada Doctors ke liye upgrade karein.
staff.remove-confirm: {name} ko {clinic} se hataein? Unka access turant band ho jaayega.
staff.invite-expired: Yeh invitation expire ho gaya. Apne Clinic Owner se dobara bhejwaein.

settings.title: Settings
settings.clinic-slug-locked: Booking URL badlne ke liye support se contact karein.

onboarding.step1.title: Apna clinic set up karein
onboarding.step1.subtitle: Apni practice ke baare mein batayein. 2 minute se kam lagenge.
onboarding.step1.slug-locked: Pehli save ke baad slug nahi badal sakte.
onboarding.step1.legal-intro: Shuru karne se pehle, please inhe padh kar accept karein. Yeh aapki aur aapke patients ki suraksha karte hain.
onboarding.step1.legal-tos: Maine padha aur accept karta hoon Terms of Service
onboarding.step1.legal-privacy: Maine padha aur accept karta hoon Privacy Policy
onboarding.step1.legal-dpa: Main DPDP Act 2023 ke antargat Data Fiduciary ke roop mein Data Processing Agreement accept karta hoon
onboarding.step2.title: Pehla doctor add karein
onboarding.step2.subtitle: Baad mein Settings se aur doctors add kar sakte hain.
onboarding.step3.title: Working hours set karein
onboarding.step3.subtitle: Batayein ki aapka clinic kab khula rehta hai.
onboarding.step4.title: WhatsApp Business connect karein
onboarding.step4.subtitle: WhatsApp se appointment reminders aur confirmations bhejein.
onboarding.complete.title: Sab ready hai!
onboarding.complete.subtitle: Aapka clinic ready hai. Ek sample appointment dekhte hain.
onboarding.error.slug-invalid: Slug mein sirf lowercase letters, numbers aur hyphens ho sakte hain
onboarding.error.legal-required: Aage badhne ke liye teeno agreements accept karein
onboarding.error.generic: Kuch gadbad ho gayi. Dobara try karein.
onboarding.error.fee-invalid: Fee ek positive number hona chahiye
